intent: Reinforce recruiterstack so it works cleanly with AGI-Codex and preserves the staffing funnel contract.
decisions: Bootstrap repo-local AGI-Codex scaffolding instead of forcing a machine-wide migration.
Keep the funnel instructions in AGENTS.md primary and let AGI-Codex operate as reinforcement underneath.
Seed healing and learning state from bugs already found in browser testing.
next_steps: Push the AGI-Codex reinforcement files once the user is happy with the repo state.
Re-run end-to-end AI planning tests after ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is configured locally.
summary_excerpt: Recruiterstack now includes repo-local AGI-Codex hooks, skills, checkpointing, learning state, and healing patterns while preserving the plain-English staffing funnel behavior.
